trackedDelta: Amended tromso-europa-league-qualifying-2026-27 (1st-leg result 0–1 + return leg added) and brann-conference-league-qualifying-2026-27 (1st-leg result 2–2 + home-leg summary context). No entries added or removed. lastUpdated bumped.

failures: Minor: Tromsø-away event summary names 'Viaplay (sender trolig også)' while streaming[] lists only VG TV — an honest hedge, not a hard contradiction, but the blurb could stay on the confirmed platform.

Minor: the norwegian-rights.js line-83 (/europa/ -> TV 2 Play) revert-war has recurred ~3 runs — correctly escalated to self-repair/verify (out of research's own scope), but the loop is spinning on a known code fix.

notes: Standard-tier Opus evening run (~23.35 CEST), ~6.5h after the 14:55Z run. TRIGGER: ordinary 4-hourly slot; board already densely covered. The only dynamic domain since 14:55Z was tonight's Norwegian European qualifier results + return-leg scheduling. Fanned out three parallel web scouts (football / CS2 / cycling) + one independent write-time fact-check.

SIGNALS: coverage-audit (22 Jul) CLEAN (0 gaps); scout-log 'quiet' through 19:15Z; coverage-gaps 21:00Z = 8 gaps, ALL false positives (Sagosen handball-transfer, Molde curiosity, Man City/Arsenal/Real Madrid/Liverpool/PL transfer+injury headlines with no fixture; Viktor Hovland Aug-16 tracked-claim = ranking-gated FedEx playoff, correctly not board-asserted). No demand[] field present.

ADDED (1): FC Hradec Králové–Tromsø — Europa League 2nd qualifying round RETURN leg (away), Thu 30 July 19:00 CEST / 17:00 UTC, FINEP Arena, Hradec Králové. Held off the board since 14:55Z pending an exact kick-off time; the time is now published (til.no + UEFA match 2048751 + FOX boxscore all agree 17:00 UTC) → added, confidence high. Independent write-time fact-check confirmed date/time, CORRECTED the venue (the ground was renamed Malšovická aréna → FINEP Arena on 1 July 2026, fchk.cz), and softened Viaplay to 'likely, not match-confirmed' (only VG TV / Nordlys / Direktesport explicitly names this away leg) → streaming set VG TV-only.

AMENDED (1): Brann home leg (30 July) summary now carries the 1st-leg result — U Cluj 2–2 Brann (Brann led 0–2 via Castro 40', Myhre 53'; Cluj equalised late via Lukić 85', Pinho 87') → aggregate level going into the return. Gives the board an accurate 'Nå' context.

1st-LEG RESULTS (context, not new board events — both legs already ended tonight): Tromsø LOST 0–1 at home (van Buren 85', + a saved penalty) — an upset, Tromsø now trail on aggregate and must overturn it away. Brann drew 2–2 away.

HELD (correct discipline): CS2 — 100 Thieves' BLAST Bounty S2 R16 (expected ~Sat 25 July) still UNSCHEDULED (pick-your-opponent draft format; Liquipedia lists nothing after 23 July, no opponent/time published) → not boarded; verify/fetcher takes it when BLAST publishes. 100T eliminated from StarLadder StarSeries Fall EU qualifier today (lost to Nuclear TigeRES 1–2) — no other confirmed 100T match in the next ~10 days.

CYCLING: TdF stage 19 (Gap→Alpe d'Huez, Fri 24 July) start 12:00 UTC (14:00 CEST) RE-CONFIRMED against cyclingstage.com — board correct, no change. NO new Norwegian withdrawals after stage 18 (Torstein Træen remains the only Norwegian abandon, DNS stage 7); all six Norwegians still racing. Danmark Rundt stage-1 11:40 UTC could not be freshly re-verified from a primary source (digitalt.tv 403) — leave as-is, flagged for re-check. Arctic Race of Norway stage-1 start time STILL unpublished (official page placeholders empty).

STREAMING REVERT-WAR FLAG (unchanged, for self-repair + verify): the Tromsø return leg's VG TV streaming will likely be re-clobbered to 'TV 2 Play' on the next pipeline build because norwegian-rights.js line 83 maps /europa/ → TV 2 Play. CORRECT: Europa League + Conference League (incl. qualifiers) = Viaplay t.o.m. 2031 (+ VG TV/Amedia/Direktesport free-stream for Norwegian clubs' matches); only Champions League = TV 2 Play t.o.m. 2026/27. Durable fix: split line 83 so /europa|conference/ → Viaplay, not TV 2 Play. Verify (05:30Z tomorrow, after tonight's legs) should confirm+protect VG TV via verificationStatus.

SOURCE-QUIRK NOTE (carry-forward, not board-affecting): tv-listings.json earlier carried Tromsø's tie CORRUPT ('Tromsø vs FC Viktoria Plzen' 18:00 — wrong opponent, wrong time); harmless because matchListing needs both team names, but a candidate for source-quirks / self-repair source-quality flag.

RECONCILE: no expired tracked entries to drop (earliest active expiry rosenborg 2026-07-25). catalog tier1/tier2 spot-check consistent with tracked coverage; no drift this run (a full reconcile ran 14:55Z ~6.5h ago). validate-events.js: 63 events, 0 errors (2 expected Saint Louis chess timezone-bleed warnings + 1 expected streaming-missing = Danmark Rundt stage 1, intentionally empty).
